existing_temporal_symbols.name: consecutive_financial_year_following
existing_temporal_symbols.description: The first financial year (Y2) is the consecutive financial year immediately following the second financial year (Y1).

existing_temporal_symbols.name: consecutive_pair_exceeded
existing_temporal_symbols.description: Y1 and Y2 form a consecutive pair where more than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in both years.

existing_temporal_symbols.name: consecutive_pair_no_longer_exceeded
